title: Southwest Airlines: Great Business, Greater Opportunity
text: Operations have stabilized after the pandemic and are trending in the right direction. I expect staffing and efficiency to reach pre-pandemic levels by 2024. Southwest has not seen material consequences of a recession, and bookings are recovering in leisure. Business demand is still down from pre-pandemic levels.

title: Southwest Airlines Stock: A Buy With Shareholder Returns On The Horizon
text: Southwest Airlines' results show that the methodological business approach is coming to fruition. The company is aligning for network restoration next year.

title: ‘Bleisure” Travel Is The Talk Of The Airline Industry. Southwest Wonders If It's For Real
text: 'Bleisure" travel was a frequent topic on third quarter airline earnings calls, but Southwest CEO Robert Jordan says, “I've personally been slow to decide that we have a new trend, and that (it's) the trend for a long period of time,."

title: Southwest Airlines Co. (LUV) Q3 2022 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE:LUV ) Q3 2022 Earnings Conference Call October 27, 2022 12:30 PM ET Company Participants Ryan Martinez – Vice President-Investor Relations Linda Rutherford – Chief Administration and Communications Officer Bob Jordan – Chief Executive Officer Mike Van de Ven – President Andrew Watterson – Chief Operating Officer Tammy Romo – Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer Ryan Green – Executive Vice President and Chief Commercial Officer Conference Call Participants Andrew Didora – Bank of America Scott Group – Wolfe Research Jamie Baker – JPMorgan Ravi Shanker – Morgan Stanley Duane Pfennigwerth – Evercore Conor Cunningham – Melius Research Savi Syth – Raymond James Brandon Oglenski – Barclays Chris Stathoulopoulos – SIG Sheila Kahyaoglu – Jefferies Alison Sider – Wall Street Journal Robert Silk – Travel Weekly David Slotnick – TPG Leslie Josephs – CNBC Operator Good day everyone. And welcome to the Southwest Airlines Third Quarter 2022 Conference Call.

title: Southwest sees strong holiday travel demand
text: Southwest Airlines expressed confidence in holiday travel demand Thursday after reporting record operating revenue over the three-month period ending in September.

title: Southwest Airlines (LUV) Q3 Earnings Beat, 2022 View Tweaked
text: Southwest Airlines (LUV) third-quarter 2022 revenues benefit from improvement in leisure demand and loyalty program, amid the unfavorable impact of Hurricane Ian.

title: Southwest Airlines Sees Strong Travel Demand Ahead. The Stock Is Climbing.
text: The airline expects to generate strong profits and margins in the fourth quarter based on current strong business and leisure travel trends.

title: Southwest Airlines stock jumps after Q3 profit beat, load factor tops pre-pandemic levels
text: Shares of Southwest Airlines Co. LUV, -0.72% jumped 2.6% in premarket trading Thursday, after the air carrier reported third-quarter profit beat expectations and load factor that exceeded pre-pandemic levels, as leisure travel demand remained strong and business travel trends improved. Net income fell to $277 million, or 44 cents a share, from $446 million, or 73 cents a share, in the year-ago period.

title: Southwest says travel demand still strong, warns Boeing delays could continue into 2024
text: Southwest said delivery delays will determine its schedules going forward.

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES REPORTS THIRD QUARTER 2022 RESULTS
text: DALLAS , Oct. 27, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co. (NYSE: LUV) (the "Company") today reported its third quarter 2022 financial results: Net income of $277 million, or $0.44 per diluted share Net income, excluding special items1, of $316 million, or $0.50 per diluted share Record third quarter operating revenues of $6.2 billion Liquidity2 of $14.7 billion, well in excess of debt outstanding of $8.7 billion Bob Jordan, Chief Executive Officer, stated, "We are pleased to report solid third quarter 2022 profits and record third quarter operating revenues. Following record summer leisure travel demand, revenue trends remained strong in September 2022, bolstered by improving business travel trends post-Labor Day.

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES' CUSTOMER SERVICE EMPLOYEES TO VOTE ON NEW CONTRACT
text: DALLAS , Oct. 26, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co.  (NYSE: LUV) (the "Company") and the International Association of Machinists and Aerospace Workers (IAM) have reached a Tentative Agreement for a new contract to cover the Company's more than 8,000 Customer Service Employees. "Our goal from the beginning has been to reach an agreement that rewards our Customer Service Employees for their many contributions to Southwest®, while being mindful of needed efficiencies to keep our Company agile and competitive.

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES BECOMES OFFICIAL AIRLINE OF PAUL QUINN COLLEGE, JOINS LIST OF PARTNERS FOR URBAN WORK COLLEGE PROGRAM
text: Through this partnership with the Dallas-based Historically Black College and University, the carrier continues to champion educational attainment for all DALLAS , Oct. 25, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co.  (NYSE: LUV) announces a partnership with Paul Quinn College to become the College's official airline and a member of the school's celebrated Urban Work College Program. Southwest Airlines® has long believed educated communities are empowered communities, and continues to invest in workforce development programs that introduce students to the diverse set of career opportunities in the aviation industry.

title: Tentative deal would boost pay for 8,000 Southwest Airlines workers
text: DALLAS — More than 8,000 customer-service workers at Southwest Airlines would get raises of 16% to 25% over four years under a tentative contract, a sign of cost pressures facing airlines in a tight labor market.

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES ANNOUNCES LIMITED-TIME RAPID REWARDS POINTS BOOKING OFFER, SAVE 20% OFF BASE FARES FOR FALL AND WINTER TRAVEL
text: Carrier offers 20% off base fares for all bookings using Rapid Rewards points for fall and winter travel, including Thanksgiving Day and Black Friday travel dates DALLAS , Oct. 18, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co.  (NYSE: LUV) today announces that its award-winning Rapid Rewards® frequent flyer program has launched a promotional offer giving Members more ways to save on their next flight. Rapid Rewards Members who book a flight with Rapid Rewards points today through Oct. 20, 2022, can save 20% off base fares for all bookings with points (domestic and international) for travel Oct. 18 through Dec. 15, 2022 (blackout dates apply).

title: 4AIR to Partner with Southwest Airlines to Document Sustainable Aviation Fuel Use
text: BOSTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)--4AIR, the first and only rating system focused on comprehensive sustainability in aviation, today announced that it will provide Sustainable Aviation Fuel (SAF) inventory accounting and documentation services for Southwest Airlines® (NYSE: LUV).

title: 7 Stocks to Buy Regardless of Q3 Earnings
text: Third quarter earnings season is approaching fast. So I wanted to take a look at stocks to buy.

title: Airline stocks rise on Delta's strong 3Q revenue as carrier touts continuing travel recovery
text: Airline stocks rose in premarket trading on Thursday after Delta Air Lines reported third-quarter revenue significantly above the same period in 2019, before the pandemic hit.

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES' AIRCRAFT APPEARANCE TECHNICIANS APPROVE NEW AGREEMENT
text: DALLAS , Oct. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co.  (NYSE: LUV) (the "Company") today announced the Company's Aircraft Appearance Technicians, represented by the Aircraft Mechanics Fraternal Association (AMFA), have voted in favor of a new five-year agreement. "This contract rewards our Appearance Technicians with immediate and future compensation increases while continuing to support Southwest's competitive cost position in the U.S. airline industry," said Adam Carlisle , Vice President Labor Relations at Southwest Airlines®.

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES AND HISPANIC ASSOCIATION OF COLLEGES AND UNIVERSITIES ANNOUNCE RECIPIENTS FOR 18TH YEAR OF STUDENT TRAVEL AWARD PROGRAM
text: DALLAS , Oct. 12, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co.  (NYSE: LUV) in partnership with the Hispanic Association of Colleges and Universities (HACU), announced its 2022 recipients for the ¡Lánzate!/Take Off! Higher Education Travel Award Program.

title: SOUTHWEST AIRLINES LAUNCHES 'GO WITH HEART' BRAND CAMPAIGN
text: Carrier highlights points of difference, flexible policies, and ongoing efforts toward Customer Modernization for an enhanced onboard experience DALLAS , Oct. 10, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co . (NYSE: LUV) today launched a new brand campaign, "Go with Heart," showcasing the carrier's points of difference, including bags fly free®, 1 no change or cancellation fees, 1 points don't expire, 2 and flight credits don't expire.

title: Airlines enter earnings season wrestling with fuel prices, hiring challenges
text: The earnings season for the U.S. airline industry is about to start. So what can we expect?

title: Southwest® Rapid Rewards® Credit Cards from Chase Launch the Teach the Love Contest to Celebrate and Give Back to U.S. Teachers
text: WILMINGTON, Del.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Southwest® Rapid Rewards® Credit Cards from Chase announces the launch of the Teach the Love Contest, a platform to nominate deserving educators for the chance to embark on a learning-fueled “Edu-Vacation” trip celebrating their teaching specialties or personal interests. Winners will pick from one of five U.S. destinations known for educational experiences, from the coral reefs of Kahului (Maui) to the museums of Washington D.C.* Nominate a Teacher Cur

title: WANNA GETAWAY FOR AS LOW AS $29 ONE-WAY? SOUTHWEST AIRLINES ANNOUNCES LARGEST WINTER SALE OF THE YEAR
text: Carrier offers fares starting as low as $29 one-way for travel through Feb. 15, 2023 DALLAS , Oct. 4, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Southwest Airlines Co.  (NYSE: LUV) today launched one of its largest and most iconic sales of the year with fares as low as $29 one-way. Starting today through Oct. 6, Customers can book their winter getaway for travel valid from Nov. 29, 2022, through Feb. 15, 2023 (travel blacked out Dec. 16, 2022, through Jan. 9, 2023).

title: Southwest (LUV) COO & President Plans to Retire by Year End
text: Mike Van de Ven is stepping down as chief operating officer and president of Southwest Airlines (LUV) at year-end. He is taking up the role of executive advisor at the beginning of 2023.

title: Southwest Airlines Stock Has Lost More Than 50% Since 2017- Here's Why
text: Southwest Airlines Co (NYSE: LUV) stock price lost more than 50% from $65 in 2017 end to around $31 currently, primarily due to unfavorable changes in its P/S multiple.
